# NotiProof

> Social proof and testimonial platform that increases website conversions by 10–35%.

NotiProof is a SaaS platform that helps businesses boost website conversions through real-time social proof notifications, testimonial collection, review aggregation, and visitor engagement tools. Trusted by 2,000+ conversion-focused teams worldwide.

## Core Product

- **Social Proof Notifications**: Real-time purchase, signup, and activity alerts displayed on your website
- **Testimonials Collection**: Collect text, image, and video testimonials from customers
- **Video Testimonial Recorder**: In-browser video recording for customer reviews
- **Review Aggregation**: Pull and display reviews from Google, G2, Trustpilot, and more
- **Campaign Builder**: Create targeted notification campaigns with display rules and scheduling
- **Analytics & Insights**: Conversion tracking dashboard with revenue attribution
- **Visitor Counter**: Live visitor count widget
- **Recent Activity Feed**: Real-time activity notifications
- **Testimonials & Reviews Widget**: Embeddable review display widgets
- **A/B Testing**: Built-in split testing for notification variants
- **38+ Integrations**: Shopify, WooCommerce, WordPress, Stripe, Zapier, HubSpot, Webflow, and more

## Pricing

- Free: $0/mo — 1 website, 5K monthly views, basic templates, community support
- Starter: $5/mo — 3 websites, 30K monthly views, 300MB media storage, 3-min video recording, unlimited testimonials & forms, analytics, all templates & integrations, remove branding, priority support
- Standard: $15/mo — Unlimited websites, 100K monthly views, 500MB media storage, same features as Starter (most popular)
- Professional: $40/mo — Unlimited websites, 400K monthly views, 1GB media storage, A/B testing, targeting rules, all Starter/Standard features
- Lifetime Deal: $79 one-time — 25,000 events/mo, 3 websites, all features forever

## Use Cases

- E-commerce: Boost sales with purchase notifications and review widgets
- SaaS: Drive trial signups with real-time social proof
- Agencies: Offer CRO as a service to clients
- Local Business: Convert website visitors with trust signals
